title: Finite Measure Monotonicity And Subadditivity Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite measure bad monotonicity and subadditivity QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed finite measure rows where exact replay computes mu({a})=1/6 and mu({a,b})=1/2 while the false subset row claims mu({a})=2/3, and inclusion-exclusion computes mu(A union B)=1 with mu(A)+mu(B)=4/3 while the false union row claims 3/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-measure rows only when they add distinct exact-linear countable-horizon, domination, convergence, or measure-table pressure; keep arbitrary measure-space theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite sigma-algebra and normalized measure-table checks as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay subset monotonicity through finite set difference and exact finite additivity.
Replay finite union subadditivity through exact inclusion-exclusion.
Route false finite subset-measure and union-subadditivity claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the source measures.
Keep arbitrary measure-space monotonicity, countable subadditivity, convergence theorems, and almost-everywhere reasoning marked Lean-horizon.
